issues_found: Source is a listing/calendar page (webcasts index), prohibited by Rule 8
No substantive macro catalyst content present—only event titles and dates
URL is blank, preventing source verification and traceability
No actual policy statements, economic data, or market-relevant content
Source is a container page with no standalone archival value
PAGE_TYPE should be 'listing_page', not 'article' or content page
human_review_reason: Clear Rule 8 violation—listing pages must not be accepted regardless of source institution relevance. Bank of Canada is a legitimate macro catalyst source, but this specific page is merely a navigation index with no actionable content.

corrected_fields.summary: This is a calendar/index listing page from the Bank of Canada website showing scheduled and past webcasts of speeches and press conferences. The page contains no substantive macro catalyst content—it lists only event titles, dates, and times. Actual policy-relevant information would only be available by accessing individual event links, which are not included in this source. This page has no standalone archival value.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: While the Bank of Canada is a relevant macro catalyst source and the listed event types (e.g., Policy Rate Announcements, Monetary Policy Reports) would be highly relevant if actual content were present, this specific page provides no actionable macro information. It serves only as a navigation aid. Per Rule 8, listing pages must not be archived.
